summary: Autonomous classification only; no GitHub mutations performed. #41461 is quarantined by the preflight security boundary. #44319, #45395, #46607, and #67843 are unrelated implementation PRs in the same touched files/agents area and are not duplicates of the Anthropic OAuth canonical hint. No merge or close is recommended because available PRs either fail security/merge gates, are draft/failing, have unresolved bot findings, or belong to separate issue families.

actions.reason: Security-sensitive item is out of scope for ProjectClownfish backlog cleanup; route exact ref to central OpenClaw security handling.
Related Anthropic OAuth issue remains open; closure is blocked because the paired implementation is quarantined and no safe canonical fix path is explicit.
Different bug family; keep open as independent rather than duplicate/superseded.
